meanings.usage: 指故意制造的欺骗他人取乐的虚假事件

meanings.meaning: 气动的；由压缩空气操作的
meanings.usage: 常用来描述靠气体压力工作的工具或设备
指用于钻孔的工具，pneumatic drill即风钻、气动钻机
指故意误导他人的行为或手段
常用搭配indulge in sth，表示放任自己做某事
指受到伤害、欺骗或不利影响的人
常用搭配be grateful to sb for sth，表示因某事感谢某人
用于描述在事件发生前给出的信息、通知等
指带有拱形顶的通道或入口
常用搭配threaten to do sth，表示扬言要做某事
常用搭配remonstrate with sb，表示向某人提出异议或规劝
用来描述动作或情绪的强烈程度
用于描述带有讽刺意味的说话或行为方式
表示正式允许某人做某事，常用被动语态permission was granted
表示和某人一起去某处，常用搭配accompany sb to sp

phrases.usage: 表示专门从事、专攻某一领域或活动

examples.en: The company specializes in organic skincare products.
examples.zh: 这家公司专门生产有机护肤产品。

phrases.usage: 表示装扮成、打扮成特定的样子

examples.en: The little girl dressed up as a princess for the Halloween party.
examples.zh: 小女孩在万圣节派对上装扮成了公主。

examples.en: It took the firefighters three hours to put out the forest fire.
examples.zh: 消防员花了三个小时才扑灭这场森林火灾。

phrases.usage: 表示认真对待某人、把某人的话当回事

examples.en: Don't take him seriously - he's always making silly jokes.
examples.zh: 别把他的话当真，他总爱开无聊的玩笑。

phrases.usage: 表示开某人的玩笑、捉弄某人

examples.en: The boys love to play jokes on their classmates on April Fool's Day.
examples.zh: 男孩子们喜欢在愚人节那天捉弄同学。

examples.en: The police were on the scene within five minutes of receiving the emergency call.
examples.zh: 警察接到紧急电话后五分钟内就赶到了现场。

phrases.usage: 表示靠武力、用强制手段

examples.en: The security guards had to remove the troublemaker by force.
examples.zh: 保安不得不强行把闹事者带走。

examples.en: He lost his temper when he found his laptop had been damaged.
examples.zh: 当他发现自己的笔记本电脑被弄坏时，他发了脾气。

examples.en: The suspect was under arrest for stealing cars.
examples.zh: 这名嫌疑人因盗窃车辆被逮捕。

examples.en: I need to make a telephone call to my parents to tell them I'll be home late.
examples.zh: 我得给我父母打个电话，告诉他们我会晚点儿回家。

grammar.title: only引导的部分倒装句
grammar.definition: 当"only+状语（从句）"位于句首时，句子需要使用部分倒装结构，即将助动词、情态动词或be动词提到主语之前，强调该状语的条件性
grammar.structure: Only + 状语/状语从句 + 助动词/情态动词/be动词 + 主语 + 谓语剩余部分
grammar.usage: 用于强调只有在某个条件下才会发生某事，突出条件的重要性

examples.en: Only when he saw that the man was actually telephoning the police did he realize that they had all been the victims of a hoax.
examples.zh: 当他看到那个人真的在给警察打电话时，他才意识到他们所有人都成了一场恶作剧的受害者。

examples.en: Only by practicing every day can you improve your spoken English quickly.
examples.zh: 只有每天练习，你才能快速提高英语口语。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It has never been explained why...

original.en: It has never been explained why university students seem to enjoy practical jokes more than anyone else.
original.zh: 为什么大学生似乎比其他人更喜欢搞恶作剧，这一点一直没有得到解释。

imitations.en: It has never been explained why this ancient custom disappeared suddenly hundreds of years ago.
imitations.zh: 为什么这个古老的习俗在几百年前突然消失，一直没有得到解释。

imitations.en: It has never been explained why he quit his well-paid job without telling anyone.
imitations.zh: 为什么他没告诉任何人就辞掉了高薪工作，这一点没人说得清。

sentencePatterns.pattern: As soon as sb had done sth, sb did sth else

original.en: As soon as he had hung up, he went over to the workmen and told them that if a policeman ordered them to go away, they were not to take him seriously.
original.zh: 他一挂电话，就走到工人那里，告诉他们如果有警察命令他们离开，不要把他当回事。

imitations.en: As soon as she had finished her homework, she went to the park to walk her dog.
imitations.zh: 她一做完作业，就去公园遛狗了。

imitations.en: As soon as the guests had left, he started to clean up the messy living room.
imitations.zh: 客人一走，他就开始打扫乱糟糟的客厅。

original.en: At this, the police pointed out ironically that this would hardly be necessary as the men were already under arrest.
original.zh: 听到这话，警察讽刺地指出，这几乎没有必要，因为这两个人已经被逮捕了。

imitations.en: At this, the little girl burst into tears and ran to her mother.
imitations.zh: 听到这话，小女孩突然哭了起来，跑向她的妈妈。

imitations.en: At this, the manager smiled and nodded to show his agreement with the proposal.
imitations.zh: 听到这里，经理笑了笑，点头表示他同意这个提议。
